name: Galaxy Blaster Defend the Galaxy
description: Galaxy Blaster is an action-packed space shooter where you defend the galaxy from waves of alien invaders. Blast through endless enemy waves, dodge enemy bullets, and collect powerful power-ups. Face epic boss battles at the end of each level. How many levels can you survive before the galaxy falls?
instructions: Mouse Touch - Move your spaceship Left Click Tap - Shoot Collect power-ups to upgrade your weapon Dodge enemy bullets to stay alive Defeat the boss to advance to next level
